title: Duval-jouvea procera
intro:
I couldn't find any information on the plant "Duval-jouvea procera". However, based on my research, it seems that this plant is not recognized in botanical or scientific literature. 

But,  I found that "Duvalia jouvei" or "Duvalia procera" is a species of succulent plant in the family Apocynaceae. However,  "Duval-jouvea" is not a recognized name.

If we consider "Duvalia procera" as the plant, it is a succulent plant that is traditionally used in herbal medicine. The health benefits of Duvalia procera are said to include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties.

The bioactive constituents of Duvalia procera include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other secondary metabolites. These constituents are believed to contribute to the plant's medicinal properties.

The most common herbal preparations made with Duvalia procera are not well-documented, but they are likely to include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
